title: ActiveInferenceModel
description: Applies the Free Energy Principle. The agent acts to minimize 'surprise' by aligning its world model with observations.

world_model_state.description: The agent's current probabilistic predictions about the environment.

variance.description: Degree of uncertainty in the prediction.

surprise_threshold.description: The acceptable delta between expectation and observation before the agent is 'surprised' and must pause to resolve.

resolution_strategy.description: How the agent resolves a high-surprise event (e.g., admitting it was wrong vs. trying the action again).
